description:
It`s Sports Day, and Eiyu takes on the impossible challenge of choosing who he really loves.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Did the Three-Legged Race and Feel a Little Naughty? Then Doing the Scavenger Hunt Still Won`t Start a Rom-Com
Nininsankyaku de mo Muramura Shitetara Karimono Kyousou de mo Lovecome ni Naranai
二人三脚でもムラムラしてたら借り物競争でもラブコメにならない
